channel.title: SP Productions Daily
channel.description: Daily shows from SP Productions. AI and Tech News Cast with Daxon Caine, three times daily.
channel.itunes:author: SP Productions
channel.itunes:summary: AI and Tech News Cast with Daxon Caine. Morning, Midday, and Evening editions covering AI models, business, developer tools, culture, and travel.

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Evening Edition - 2026-04-12
item.description: Evening Edition: Hacker Uses Claude and ChatGPT to Breach Government Agencies; MiniMax M2.7 Released — Strong Benchmarks, Controversial License; WSJ: Man Dies After 4,732 Messages to Gemini Chatbot; Palantir CEO: AI Will Destroy Humanities Jobs; College Grads 'Helpless' as AI Shrinks Entry-Level Job Market; Linux Finalizes AI Code Policy: Yes to Copilot, No to Slop; Berkeley Research: 8 Major AI Benchmarks Are Gameable
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Evening Edition - 2026-04-12

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Morning Edition - 2026-04-12
item.description: Morning Edition: AI Models: [hackernews] Small models also found the vulnerabilities that Mythos found; GPT Image 2 preview; [newsletter/NVIDIA <news@nvidia.com>] NVIDIA Enhances Cosmos Platform for Physical AI with New Capab; [newsletter/HeyGen <no_reply@email.heygen.com>] HeyGen launches Avatar V, a new advanced AI avatar m | Business: Neuralink enables nonverbal ALS patient to speak again with thoughts and AI-cloned voice; Sam Altman Tries, Fails to Distract From Damning 'New Yorker' Exposé; Two manufacturers commit to keep Blu-ray alive after others quit manufacturing — Verbatim and I-O Da; Palantir CEO says AI 'will destroy' humanities jobs | Dev Tools: Saw this on Instagram.; 20 Years on AWS and Never Not My Job; What kinda fun can be had with this?; First Time Homelabbing is this good?? | Culture: Decided to make my own stable diffusion; Ai TikTok scams becoming more realistic.; Afrodoman - Extended version; I changed my mind | Wild Card: [hackernews] Cirrus Labs to join OpenAI; [hackernews] Anthropic silently downgraded cache TTL from 1h → 5M on March 6th; [hackernews] High-Level Rust: Getting 80% of the Benefits with 20% of the Pain; [hackernews] How a dancer with ALS used brainwaves to perform live
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Morning Edition - 2026-04-12

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Morning Edition - 2026-04-11
item.description: Morning Edition: AI Models: [newsletter/NVIDIA <news@nvidia.com>] NVIDIA Enhances Cosmos Platform for Physical AI with New Capab; [newsletter/HeyGen <webinar@learn.heygen.com>] HeyGen unveils Avatar V, its most advanced AI avatar | Business: Tesla Plummets into 8th Consecutive Week of Losses as JPMorgan Warns of 60% Downside; Gen Z workers are so fearful AI will take their job they’re intentionally sabotaging their company’s; Reddit Ordered to Reveal User Data in ICE Investigation: A Threat to Free Speech? | Dev Tools: Stuck in a company with no Git workflow, no PRs, and resistance to change😭; trust me, bro; I built a microkernel from scratch in Rust (5-part series: boot, IPC, preemption, virtual memory); IBM server lot won at auction | Culture: Redneck Harry Potter; If only....; The 'Real' Bob's Burgers; “It’s just a joke!!!!” | Wild Card: [hackernews] Molotov cocktail is hurled at home of Sam Altman; [hackernews] AI assistance when contributing to the Linux kernel; [hackernews] Launch HN: Twill.ai (YC S25) – Delegate to cloud agents, get back PRs; [hackernews] Great at gaming? US air traffic control wants you to apply
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Morning Edition - 2026-04-11

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Midday Edition - 2026-04-11
item.description: Midday Edition: AI Models: [newsletter/NVIDIA <news@nvidia.com>] NVIDIA Enhances Cosmos Platform for Physical AI with New Capab; [newsletter/HeyGen <webinar@learn.heygen.com>] HeyGen unveils Avatar V, its most advanced AI avatar | Business: US demands Reddit unmask ICE critic, summons firm to grand jury; A $300 device can silently override GPS across an entire city. Autonomous vehicles, delivery drones,; AI isn't creating unemployment. It's creating feudalism. I wrote a long-form analysis of where I thi; [newsletter/Nate Herk <uppitai@mail.beehiiv.com>] AI Automation Agency Founder Launches Course on Bu | Dev Tools: Original Apollo 11 code open-sourced by NASA — original Command Module and Lunar Module code repos a; Floating point from scratch: Hard Mode; tududi v1.0.0 is out! - your calm, open system for life and work; Borg UI just hit 1,000+ stars and 2.0 is here - Web interface for BorgBackup | Culture: This is why 2 sticks of RAM cost 900$; The classic UX you know and love; I tried to recreate dragon ball trunks scene; Anti-Ai hate mob gets mad at teenager for their book having AI art as the cover... | Wild Card: [hackernews] AI assistance when contributing to the Linux kernel; [hackernews] Cirrus Labs to join OpenAI; [hackernews] BlueHammer abuses Windows Defender's update process to gain SYSTEM access
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Midday Edition - 2026-04-11

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Evening Edition - 2026-04-11
item.description: Evening Edition: AI Models: [newsletter/NVIDIA <news@nvidia.com>] NVIDIA Enhances Cosmos Platform for Physical AI with New Capab; [newsletter/HeyGen <no_reply@email.heygen.com>] HeyGen launches Avatar V, a new advanced AI avatar m | Business: Silicon Valley is quietly running on Chinese open source models and almost nobody is talking about i; Rockstar Games Reportedly Hacked, Team Behind It Threaten A Massive Data Leak If Not Paid Ransom; Sam Altman Tries, Fails to Distract From Damning 'New Yorker' Exposé; 'We Have No Chance Against This,' Honda CEO Says After Seeing Chinese Supplier Factory: TDS | Dev Tools: Saw this on Instagram.; Floating point from scratch: Hard Mode; Anyone near palm beach want some old supermicro servers x11 before i trash them? No sales. Just free; 20 Years on AWS and Never Not My Job | Culture: Clanker crime rates are rising; Decided to make my own stable diffusion; Mister Fluffy?; And then they wonder why people prefer AI over commissioning a delusional artist | Wild Card: [hackernews] AI assistance when contributing to the Linux kernel; [hackernews] Cirrus Labs to join OpenAI
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Evening Edition - 2026-04-11

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Midday Edition - 2026-04-10
item.description: Midday Edition: AI Models: [newsletter/HeyGen <webinar@learn.heygen.com>] HeyGen unveils Avatar V, its most advanced AI avatar ; Cheap Open Models Reportedly Reproduced Much Of Mythos's Showcased Findings | Business: We're losing ~9 languages per year. Each one may carry irreplaceable environmental knowledge. This n; Mozilla accuses Microsoft of sabotaging Firefox with Windows and Copilot tactics; [newsletter/Nate Herk <uppitai@mail.beehiiv.com>] AI Automation Agency Founder Launches Course on Bu | Dev Tools: The AWS Lambda 'Kiss of Death'; [hackernews] Instant 1.0, a backend for AI-coded apps; Tailslayer: a hedged reads solution for DRAM refresh latency; Built a web server that runs on sunlight and 27MB of RAM | Culture: Afrodoman; Heavy truck VS monster; I drew this black dot. This is somehow better than ai because at least it has soul and creativity no; Ain’t no way bro | Wild Card: [hackernews] OpenAI backs Illinois bill that would limit when AI labs can be held liable; [hackernews] We've raised $17M to build what comes after Git; [hackernews] Why do we tell ourselves scary stories about AI?
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Midday Edition - 2026-04-10

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Evening Edition - 2026-04-10
item.description: Evening Edition: AI Models: [newsletter/NVIDIA <news@nvidia.com>] NVIDIA Enhances Cosmos Platform for Physical AI with New Capab; [newsletter/HeyGen <no_reply@email.heygen.com>] HeyGen launches Avatar V, a new advanced AI avatar m | Business: OpenAI says CEO Sam Altman's house was targeted with a Molotov cocktail; France to ditch Windows for Linux to reduce reliance on US tech; Reddit Ordered to Reveal User Data in ICE Investigation: A Threat to Free Speech?; We're losing ~9 languages per year. Each one may carry irreplaceable environmental knowledge. This n | Dev Tools: The AWS Lambda 'Kiss of Death'; Stuck in a company with no Git workflow, no PRs, and resistance to change😭; How would you solve ventilation in here?; I built a microkernel from scratch in Rust (5-part series: boot, IPC, preemption, virtual memory) | Culture: Ain’t no way bro; After ~400 Z-Image Turbo gens I finally figured out why everyone's portraits look plastic; I drew this black dot. This is somehow better than ai because at least it has soul and creativity no; If only.... | Wild Card: [hackernews] We've raised $17M to build what comes after Git; [hackernews] AI assistance when contributing to the Linux kernel; [hackernews] Supply chain nightmare: How Rust will be attacked and what we can do to mitigate; [hackernews] Launch HN: Twill.ai (YC S25) – Delegate to cloud agents, get back PRs
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Evening Edition - 2026-04-10

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Morning Edition - 2026-04-09
item.description: Morning Edition: AI Models: From Inside the Meat - short film; Ronan Farrow on Sam Altman: "We interviewed more than 100 people... a majority did say some variatio; [newsletter/HeyGen <no_reply@email.heygen.com>] HeyGen launches Avatar V, a new advanced AI avatar m | Business: ‘Ghost Murmur,’ secret technology CIA used to locate downed American Pilot; [newsletter/Nate Herk <uppitai@mail.beehiiv.com>] AI Automation Agency Founder Launches Course on Bu; ‘Accountability has arrived’: dual US court losses show shifting tide against Meta and co | Dev Tools: Fake It Until You Break It: The End Of Non-Technical Managers In Software Engineering Dawns; I Am Very Fond of the Pipeline Operator; We have ASUS Dual at home; [hackernews] USB for Software Developers: An introduction to writing userspace USB drivers | Culture: Hair Braider Machine; Antis BULLY a terminally ill mom for making ai asmr; Holy Cope; AI cheating fruits where your life is crumbling but in anime | Wild Card: [hackernews] We moved Railway's frontend off Next.js. Builds went from 10+ mins to under 2; [hackernews] I've been waiting over a month for Anthropic to respond to my billing issue; [hackernews] John Deere to pay $99M in right-to-repair settlement; [hackernews] Show HN: TUI-use: Let AI agents control interactive terminal programs
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Morning Edition - 2026-04-09

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Midday Edition - 2026-04-09
item.description: Midday Edition: AI Models: Claude Opus vs Mythos; Ronan Farrow on Sam Altman: "We interviewed more than 100 people... a majority did say some variatio; [newsletter/HeyGen <no_reply@email.heygen.com>] HeyGen launches Avatar V, a new advanced AI avatar m | Business: Gen Z workers are so fearful AI will take their job they’re intentionally sabotaging their company’s; Ukraine says it replaced human soldiers with 'ground robots' in over 21,000 missions for Q1; Greece announces social media ban for under-15s, citing anxiety and sleep problems; [newsletter/Nate Herk <uppitai@mail.beehiiv.com>] AI Automation Agency Founder Launches Course on Bu | Dev Tools: Fake It Until You Break It: The End Of Non-Technical Managers In Software Engineering Dawns; How Pizza Tycoon (1994) simulated traffic on a 25 MHz CPU; [hackernews] USB for Software Developers: An introduction to writing userspace USB drivers; Absurd Workflows: Durable Execution With Just Postgres; My journey in the last 6 months... | Culture: Posting AI art on reddit; I wish these people just wouldn’t comment, we get it, they can’t understand what “slop” means.; Did a basement for a client today, and they loved it; There, I picked up a pencil; ACE-Step 1.5 XL Turbo — BF16 version (converted from FP32) | Wild Card: [hackernews] Process Manager for Autonomous AI Agents
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Midday Edition - 2026-04-09

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Evening Edition - 2026-04-09
item.description: Evening Edition: AI Models: AI generated cow, 2014; [newsletter/HeyGen <no_reply@email.heygen.com>] HeyGen launches Avatar V, a new advanced AI avatar m | Business: Sam Altman’s Coworkers Say He Can Barely Code and Misunderstands Basic Machine Learning Concepts; Ukraine says it replaced human soldiers with 'ground robots' in over 21,000 missions for Q1; Microsoft begins removing Copilot from Windows 11, starting with Notepad, Snipping Tool; [newsletter/Nate Herk <uppitai@mail.beehiiv.com>] AI Automation Agency Founder Launches Course on Bu | Dev Tools: How NASA Built Artemis II’s Fault-Tolerant Computer; [hackernews] Show HN: CSS Studio. Design by hand, code by agent; Testing a $6 server under load (1 vCPU / 1GB RAM) - interesting limits with Nginx and Gunicorn; After my last post blew up, I audited my Docker security. It was worse than I thought. | Culture: Eren Yeager Voice Actor Has Started A AI Voice Actor Company; /Imagine - Horror Short; He’s better off without you if that all it took to end the friendship; FlowInOne - A new Multimodal image model . Released on Huggingface; LET’S TALK ABOUT THE REAL SLOP, HUHHHH??? | Wild Card: [hackernews] Maine Is About to Become the First State to Ban Major New Data Centers; [hackernews] Netflix Prices Went Up Again – I Bought a DVD Player Instead; [hackernews] OpenAI puts Stargate UK on ice, blames energy costs and red tape; [hackernews] Discovering, detecting, and surgically removing Google's AI watermark
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Evening Edition - 2026-04-09

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Morning Edition - 2026-04-08
item.description: Morning Edition: AI Models: [hackernews] System Card: Claude Mythos Preview [pdf]; Sam Altman's Coworkers Say He Can Barely Code and Misunderstands Basic Machine Learning Concepts: ""; Reset; If you ever feel useless, remember this rule exists. | Business: Google's AI search is producing millions of wrong answers every day; CIA use never-before-used tool to find airman downed in Iran; Republicans fooled by AI-generated image of US airman rescued in Iran - Fake image of crew member su | Dev Tools: I Am Very Fond of the Pipeline Operator; Cursor ditches VS Code, but not everyone is happy...; The language holding our agents back.; Claude Code is unusable now | Culture: To those who say I need to pick up a pencil. Here you go.; "the death of generative ai has finally started and its gonna be so unbelievably satisfying to watch; Anime2Half-Real (LTX-2.3); Most respectful, least bigoted anti; Update to my post | Wild Card: [hackernews] Project Glasswing: Securing critical software for the AI era
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Morning Edition - 2026-04-08

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Midday Edition - 2026-04-08
item.description: Midday Edition: AI Models: [hackernews] System Card: Claude Mythos Preview [pdf]; Sam Altman's Coworkers Say He Can Barely Code and Misunderstands Basic Machine Learning Concepts: ""; Reset; If you ever feel useless, remember this rule exists. | Business: Google's AI search is producing millions of wrong answers every day; CIA use never-before-used tool to find airman downed in Iran; Republicans fooled by AI-generated image of US airman rescued in Iran - Fake image of crew member su; India is building one of the world's largest batteries inside a solar farm five times the size of Pa | Dev Tools: Rate my server😌; I Am Very Fond of the Pipeline Operator; Thousands of consumer routers hacked by Russia's military; is this worth keeping? | Culture: To those who say I need to pick up a pencil. Here you go.; "the death of generative ai has finally started and its gonna be so unbelievably satisfying to watch; Most respectful, least bigoted anti; Update to my post | Wild Card: [hackernews] Project Glasswing: Securing critical software for the AI era
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Midday Edition - 2026-04-08

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Evening Edition - 2026-04-08
item.description: Evening Edition: AI Models: Sam Altman's Coworkers Say He Can Barely Code and Misunderstands Basic Machine Learning Concepts: ""; [newsletter/HeyGen <no_reply@email.heygen.com>] HeyGen launches Avatar V, a new advanced AI avatar m; From Inside the Meat - short film; Claude Opus vs Mythos | Business: Republicans fooled by AI-generated image of US airman rescued in Iran - Fake image of crew member su; Tech industry lays off nearly 80,000 employees in the first quarter of 2026 — almost 50% of affected; Ukraine says it replaced human soldiers with 'ground robots' in over 21,000 missions for Q1; John Deere to Pay $99 Million in Monumental Right-to-Repair Settlement | Dev Tools: I Am Very Fond of the Pipeline Operator; [hackernews] USB for Software Developers: An introduction to writing userspace USB drivers; show me your most threatening router; Multi-Core By Default - by Ryan Fleury - Digital Grove | Culture: Hair Braider Machine; To those who say I need to pick up a pencil. Here you go.; Used TripoAI's latest open-source model, TripoSG and the image to mesh results are genuinely some of; "the death of generative ai has finally started and its gonna be so unbelievably satisfying to watch | Wild Card: [hackernews] Project Glasswing: Securing critical software for the AI era; [hackernews] I've been waiting over a month for Anthropic to respond to my billing issue; [hackernews] We moved Railway's frontend off Next.js. Builds went from 10+ mins to under 2; [hackernews] One item purchased, Ten emails
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Evening Edition - 2026-04-08

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Morning Edition - 2026-04-07
item.description: Morning Edition: AI Models: Someone made a whip for Claude; [hackernews] Show HN: I built a tiny LLM to demystify how language models work; [hackernews] Claude Code is unusable for complex engineering tasks with the Feb updates | Business: “The problem is Sam Altman”: OpenAI Insiders don’t trust CEO; Goldman Sachs' blunt warning to laid-off tech workers: It will take time and earnings loss to find a | Dev Tools: I thought my VPS was hardened, but it was compromised and I can't figure out how. Please help!; NordVPN's Meshnet: is it truly free? If so, is there any certainty that I am not the product?; Stamp It! All Programs Must Report Their Version; PDF of the current POSIX standard | Culture: I posted ai art on a subreddit about an ai vtuber and this is what happened; [hackernews] AI singer now occupies eleven spots on iTunes singles chart; Antis only started caring about the environment when they found out they could weaponize it against | Wild Card: [hackernews] The cult of vibe coding is dogfooding run amok; [hackernews] Launch HN: Freestyle – Sandboxes for Coding Agents; [hackernews] After 20 years I turned off Google Adsense for my websites (2025); [hackernews] Agent Reading Test
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Morning Edition - 2026-04-07

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Midday Edition - 2026-04-07
item.description: Midday Edition: AI Models: [hackernews] Issue: Claude Code is unusable for complex engineering tasks with Feb updates; Anthropic has now hit $30b in revenue; Anthropic have signed a deal for multiple gigawatts of next generation TPUs; An actress Milla Jovovich just released a free open-source AI memory system that scored 100% on Long | Business: Target puts customers on the hook for AI shopping assistant errors; Americans May Be Losing Trust for AI in Health Care | Dev Tools: PDF of the current POSIX standard; I poorly estimated a year long rewrite; C3 closes out its 0.7 era — focusing on simplicity and control before 0.8; Accidental find while re-racking | Culture: Open-Source Models Recently:; [hackernews] AI singer now occupies eleven spots on iTunes singles chart; Trruuuue; HOW CAN THE REAL MESSAGE JUST FLY OVER HIS HEAD??? | Wild Card: [hackernews] Launch HN: Freestyle – Sandboxes for Coding Agents; [hackernews] AI may be making us think and write more alike; [hackernews] Show HN: Stop paying for Dropbox/Google Drive, use your own S3 bucket instead; [hackernews] AI Won't Replace You, but a Manager Using AI Will
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Midday Edition - 2026-04-07

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Evening Edition - 2026-04-07
item.description: Evening Edition: AI Models: An actress Milla Jovovich just released a free open-source AI memory system that scored 100% on Long; [hackernews] Claude Code is locking people out for hours; [hackernews] Taste in the age of AI and LLMs; [hackernews] System Card: Claude Mythos Preview [pdf] | Business: Honda President After Visiting Chinese Auto Supplier: 'We Have No Chance Against This'; Sam Altman says AI superintelligence is so big that we need a ‘New Deal.’ Critics say OpenAI’s polic; Data Centers Are Military Targets Now; Americans May Be Losing Trust for AI in Health Care | Dev Tools: Quarter 2 Update - Revisiting Rules. Again.; Accidental find while re-racking; C3 closes out its 0.7 era — focusing on simplicity and control before 0.8; Parse, Don't Validate — In a Language That Doesn't Want You To · cekrem.github.io | Culture: What the fuck; And this is why AI exists to break the gatekeeping BS and Barriers; Mogging Rivalry - When looksmaxxing goes homoerotic | Wild Card: [hackernews] Show HN: Stop paying for Dropbox/Google Drive, use your own S3 bucket instead; [hackernews] Project Glasswing: Securing critical software for the AI era; [hackernews] Google open-sources experimental agent orchestration testbed Scion; [hackernews] Cells for NetBSD: kernel-enforced, jail-like isolation
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Evening Edition - 2026-04-07

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Morning Edition - 2026-04-06
item.description: Morning Edition: AI Models: Claude is bypassing Permissions; OpenAI's New Stunning Image Model (Before & After); [newsletter/Nate Herk <uppitai@mail.beehiiv.com>] 18 Fixes for Claude AI Model Code Limits; Anthropic Surpasses OpenAI in ARR; McKinsey's AI Lie Explains What's Happening to Work | Business: Gen Z is engineering an analog future — and it’s at least a $5 billion opportunity; 'No on-site doctor': Dental student died in ICU overseen by remote 'tele-health' physician who prono; Japan Wants to Build a Solar Ring Around the Moon That Will Provide Endless Clean Energy to Earth; Iran threatens ‘complete and utter annihilation’ of OpenAI's $30B Stargate AI data center in Abu Dha; Linux 7.1 is finally ending support for Intel's 37-year-old 486 processor | Dev Tools: [newsletter/HeyGen <no_reply@email.heygen.com>] HeyGen and Gamma integrate to streamline AI-powered ; New server finally arrived; Negative 2000 Lines Of Code; Built a 6-bay 10Gbps NAS from a Lenovo M720Q; [hackernews] Running Gemma 4 locally with LM Studio's new headless CLI and Claude Code | Culture: AI art is art :); The "Soul" leaving my art when they find out its AI Art.; It is still possible to achieve more natural cinematic realism for videos with open source models vs; " disabled people don't need ai"; The Jetsons Live-action TV | Wild Card: [newsletter/NVIDIA Developer Relations <news@nvidia.com>] NVIDIA GTC 2026 Sessions Now Available On-; [hackernews] Eight years of wanting, three months of building with AI; [hackernews] A tail-call interpreter in (nightly) Rust; [hackernews] France pulls last gold held in US for $15B gain; [hackernews] From birds to brains: My path to the fusiform face area (2024)
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Morning Edition - 2026-04-06

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Midday Edition - 2026-04-06
item.description: Midday Edition: AI Models: Image Create guardrails are made of wet cardboard.; New Yorker published a major investigation into Sam Altman and OpenAI today — based on never-before-; I have been coding for 11 years and I caught myself completely unable to debug a problem without AI ; [D] How to break free from LLM's chains as a PhD student? | Business: OpenAI's New Stunning Image Model (Before & After); UK confirms drone-killing DragonFire laser weapon for Royal Navy destroyers by 2027 —laser downs 400; Anthropic Surpasses OpenAI in ARR | Dev Tools: Media scraper gallery-dl is moving to codeberg after receiving a DMCA notice, claiming that its circ; How Linux executes binaries: ELF and dynamic linking explained; My First Proper Homeserver; [hackernews] Show HN: Real-time AI (audio/video in, voice out) on an M3 Pro with Gemma E2B | Culture: Bro was chasing a pigeon and woke up mid-fall; I've been brainstorming ways on making democracy accountable making our government work for us inste; tiktok:; Survivorship bias at its finest | Wild Card: [hackernews] France pulls last gold held in US for $15B gain; [hackernews] The Intelligence Failure in Iran; [hackernews] Drop, formerly Massdrop, ends most collaborations and rebrands under Corsair
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Midday Edition - 2026-04-06

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Evening Edition - 2026-04-06
item.description: Evening Edition: AI Models: OpenAI's New Stunning Image Model (Before & After); [hackernews] Show HN: I built a tiny LLM to demystify how language models work; Someone made a whip for Claude; "You need to understand that Sam can never be trusted ... He is a sociopath. He would do anything." | Business: 18-month New Yorker investigation finds OpenAI’s Sam Altman lobbied against the same AI regulations ; Italian court says Netflix must refund customers up to $576 over price hikes; Jaguar: We Will Be 'Exclusively Electric'; Paramount Skydance Secures $24 Billion From Saudi Arabia, Qatar and Abu Dhabi Funds for Warner Bros. | Dev Tools: How Linux executes binaries: ELF and dynamic linking explained; [hackernews] Show HN: Real-time AI (audio/video in, voice out) on an M3 Pro with Gemma E2B; I thought my VPS was hardened, but it was compromised and I can't figure out how. Please help!; Stamp It! All Programs Must Report Their Version | Culture: Bro was chasing a pigeon and woke up mid-fall; Meme is blind; Ai art is art :); I did my best, and hope y'all like it :) | Wild Card: [hackernews] France pulls last gold held in US for $15B gain; [hackernews] Launch HN: Freestyle – Sandboxes for Coding Agents; [hackernews] Drop, formerly Massdrop, ends most collaborations and rebrands under Corsair; [hackernews] The Cult of Vibe Coding Is Insane
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Evening Edition - 2026-04-06

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Morning Edition - 2026-04-05
item.description: Morning Edition: AI Models: Claude is bypassing Permissions; [newsletter/Nate Herk <uppitai@mail.beehiiv.com>] 18 Fixes for Claude AI Model Code Limits | Business: Satellite Company Halts Distribution of Images That Help Press Cover Iran War, Cites US Government R; Maine Is About to Become the First State to Ban New Data Centers; [newsletter/Nate Herk <uppitai@mail.beehiiv.com>] AI Expert Identifies Top 5 Selling AI Workflows fo; [newsletter/Notion Team <team@mail.notion.so>] Ramp's AI Transformation Playbook to be Revealed in N | Dev Tools: [newsletter/HeyGen <no_reply@email.heygen.com>] HeyGen and Gamma integrate to streamline AI-powered ; Three weeks ago I was still subbed to Apple Music, Netflix, HBO, Libro.fm, etc. A lot happened in th | Culture: Wow, that escalated quickly; Posted my AI game and got death threats; Reddit is healing; AI Art is Still Art :) | Wild Card: [newsletter/NVIDIA Developer Relations <news@nvidia.com>] NVIDIA GTC 2026 Sessions Now Available On-; [hackernews] How many products does Microsoft have named 'Copilot'?
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Morning Edition - 2026-04-05

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Midday Edition - 2026-04-05
item.description: Midday Edition: AI Models: Claude is bypassing Permissions; [newsletter/Nate Herk <uppitai@mail.beehiiv.com>] 18 Fixes for Claude AI Model Code Limits | Business: Maine Is About to Become the First State to Ban New Data Centers; Hallucinated citations are polluting the scientific literature. What can be done? - Tens of thousand; AI cuts MRI scan time from 23 to 9 minutes at Amsterdam cancer center | Dev Tools: I built an open-source replacement for APC SmartSlot network cards (OpenNMC); [newsletter/HeyGen <no_reply@email.heygen.com>] HeyGen and Gamma integrate to streamline AI-powered | Culture: Wow, that escalated quickly; Reddit is healing; Yes, you are | Wild Card: [hackernews] How many products does Microsoft have named 'Copilot'?; [newsletter/NVIDIA Developer Relations <news@nvidia.com>] NVIDIA GTC 2026 Sessions Now Available On-
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Midday Edition - 2026-04-05

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Evening Edition - 2026-04-05
item.description: Evening Edition: AI Models: Claude is bypassing Permissions; Iran just threatened to blow up stargate; [newsletter/Nate Herk <uppitai@mail.beehiiv.com>] 18 Fixes for Claude AI Model Code Limits | Business: AI cuts MRI scan time from 23 to 9 minutes at Amsterdam cancer center; Internet shutdown in Iran is now the longest in world history; Microsoft's AI in its own terms: "use Copilot at your own risk" | Dev Tools: [newsletter/HeyGen <no_reply@email.heygen.com>] HeyGen and Gamma integrate to streamline AI-powered ; Good APIs Age Slowly; Negative 2000 Lines Of Code | Culture: A truthful meme; It is still possible to achieve more natural cinematic realism for videos with open source models vs; " disabled people don't need ai"; Another sub to Avoid | Wild Card: [newsletter/NVIDIA Developer Relations <news@nvidia.com>] NVIDIA GTC 2026 Sessions Now Available On-; [hackernews] German implementation of eIDAS will require an Apple/Google account to function; [hackernews] Someone at BrowserStack Is Leaking Users' Email Address
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Evening Edition - 2026-04-05

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Morning Edition - 2026-04-04
item.description: Morning Edition: AI Models: Altman on shutting down Sora: 'I did not expect 3 or 6 months ago to be at this point we're at now; ; Linux Kernel developers are receiving record high number of CORRECT bug reports because of AI and ex; [newsletter/Nate Herk <uppitai@mail.beehiiv.com>] 18 Fixes for Claude AI Model Code Limits | Business: Chinese scientists unveil glowing Avatar-like plants that could light cities without electricity; Oracle Files Thousands of H-1B Visa Petitions Amid Mass Layoffs; Half of planned US data center builds have been delayed or canceled, growth limited by shortages of ; Colorado’s New Speed Camera System Makes Waze Nearly Useless; RollerCoaster Tycoon YouTuber builds ride lasting 194 quattorseptuagintillion years | Dev Tools: How Microsoft Vaporized a Trillion Dollars; [newsletter/HeyGen <no_reply@email.heygen.com>] HeyGen and Gamma integrate to streamline AI-powered | Culture: For the Cure!; This Is Why Slowing Down AI Is Not Some Noble Pursuit: A Doctor Was Ready To Wait Months. The AI Fla; I found this in the awards sub.; Harry Potter Drip series is about to get Meta; What Fuel Crisis? | Wild Card: [newsletter/NVIDIA Developer Relations <news@nvidia.com>] NVIDIA GTC 2026 Sessions Now Available On-
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Morning Edition - 2026-04-04

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Midday Edition - 2026-04-04
item.description: Midday Edition: AI Models: Some meatbags are alright; [hackernews] Tell HN: Anthropic no longer allowing Claude Code subscriptions to use OpenClaw; Early anti-clankerite violence caught on film; Humanoid robots are actively training; [newsletter/Nate Herk <uppitai@mail.beehiiv.com>] 18 Fixes for Claude AI Model Code Limits | Business: Oracle fired up to 30,000 workers via email after a 95% profit surge. Tech companies are cutting alm; Iran threatens to bomb 1GW Stargate AI datacenter in Abu Dhabi; [newsletter/Nate Herk <uppitai@mail.beehiiv.com>] AI Expert Identifies Top 5 Selling AI Workflows fo; [newsletter/Notion Team <team@mail.notion.so>] Ramp's AI Transformation Playbook to be Revealed in N | Dev Tools: How Microsoft Vaporized a Trillion Dollars; [newsletter/HeyGen <no_reply@email.heygen.com>] HeyGen and Gamma integrate to streamline AI-powered ; How To Write Unmaintainable Code (1999) | Culture: How can I do this?; ENTANGLED - A 3-minute sci-fi short using 100% local open-source models. Complete Technical Breakdow; i have no words... | Wild Card: [newsletter/NVIDIA Developer Relations <news@nvidia.com>] NVIDIA GTC 2026 Sessions Now Available On-; [hackernews] Mbodi AI (YC P25) Is Hiring
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Midday Edition - 2026-04-04

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Morning Edition - 2026-04-03
item.description: Morning Edition: AI Models: [hackernews] Google releases Gemma 4 open models; [hackernews] Lemonade by AMD: a fast and open source local LLM server using GPU and NPU; [hackernews] Qwen3.6-Plus: Towards real world agents; Altman on shutting down Sora: 'I did not expect 3 or 6 months ago to be at this point we're at now; | Business: The US Burned 14 Years of Missiles in 30 Days; Iran Says It Hit Oracle Facilities in UAE; China’s solar/wind power generation now exceeds all U.S. household and industrial electricity consum; Google just set a 2029 deadline to migrate to quantum-safe encryption, years ahead of government tar | Dev Tools: Google Is Closing Android. 37 Orgs Are Fighting Back | Techlore; your CI/CD pipeline probably ran malware on march 31st between 00:21 and 03:15 UTC. here's how to ch; Can finally be one of the cool kids. | Culture: She was quite; So they're using AI to try to erase more jobs now.; If this is in Greece wouldn’t it cost multiple days of working to pay for a human to make this?; Antis being Antis.... | Wild Card: [hackernews] Tailscale's new macOS home; [hackernews] OpenAI Acquires TBPN; [hackernews] Post Mortem: axios NPM supply chain compromise; [hackernews] Zep AI Is Hiring – Building the Agent Context Layer (YC W24)
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Morning Edition - 2026-04-03

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Midday Edition - 2026-04-03
item.description: Midday Edition: AI Models: [hackernews] Google releases Gemma 4 open models; 171 emotion vectors found inside Claude. Not metaphors. Actual neuron activation patterns steering b; [hackernews] Qwen3.6-Plus: Towards real world agents; AI-2027 forecasters move their timelines ~1.5 years earlier, predict 2027 or 2028 most likely year f | Business: China’s solar/wind power generation now exceeds all U.S. household and industrial electricity consum; Australia’s teen social media ban is a flop. But there’s no joy in ‘I told you so’; Italy court rules Netflix unlawfully increased prices. Consumers: 'Refunds up to 500 euros.' The com; Sweden goes back to basics, swapping screens for books in the classroom | Dev Tools: [hackernews] Cursor 3; 7 hidden tech-debts of agentic engineering | Culture: Harry Potter Drip EP1-3 Timeline (Official) - Unhindered Studios; She was quite; So they're using AI to try to erase more jobs now.; Netflix released a model | Wild Card: [hackernews] Tailscale's new macOS home; [hackernews] Show HN: European alternatives to Google, Apple, Dropbox and 120 US apps; [hackernews] Show HN: Apfel – The free AI already on your Mac; [hackernews] New Rowhammer attacks give complete control of machines running Nvidia GPUs
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Midday Edition - 2026-04-03

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Evening Edition - 2026-04-03
item.description: Evening Edition: AI Models: Altman on shutting down Sora: 'I did not expect 3 or 6 months ago to be at this point we're at now; ; [newsletter/Nate Herk <uppitai@mail.beehiiv.com>] 18 Fixes for Claude AI Model Code Limits; Linux Kernel developers are receiving record high number of CORRECT bug reports because of AI and ex; AI will do to our minds what machines did to our bodies | Business: China’s solar/wind power generation now exceeds all U.S. household and industrial electricity consum; Tesla Is Sitting On A Record 50,000 Unsold EVs; Oracle Files Thousands of H-1B Visa Petitions Amid Mass Layoffs; Colorado’s New Speed Camera System Makes Waze Nearly Useless | Dev Tools: [hackernews] Cursor 3; [newsletter/HeyGen <no_reply@email.heygen.com>] HeyGen and Gamma integrate to streamline AI-powered ; How Microsoft Vaporized a Trillion Dollars | Culture: BLACK$NAPE - Always (Official Rap Music Video); I had fun testing out LTX's lipsync ability. Full open source Z-Image -> LTX-2.3 -> WanAnimate; Literally nobody is asking you to do that???; This Is Why Slowing Down AI Is Not Some Noble Pursuit: A Doctor Was Ready To Wait Months. The AI Fla | Wild Card: [hackernews] Tailscale's new macOS home; [hackernews] Show HN: Apfel – The free AI already on your Mac; [newsletter/NVIDIA Developer Relations <news@nvidia.com>] NVIDIA GTC 2026 Sessions Now Available On-; [hackernews] Solana Drift Protocol drained of $285M via fake token and governance hijack
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Evening Edition - 2026-04-03

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Morning Edition - 2026-04-02
item.description: Morning Edition: AI Models: Anthropic issues copyright takedown requests to remove 8,000+ copies of Claude Code source code; Updates for ChatGPT; Fascinating story: Tech Entrepreneur in Australia, using ChatGPT, AlphaFold, and a custom made mRNA ; Announcement: Temporary LLM Content Ban; A bug in Bun may have been the root cause of the Claude Code source code leak. | Business: U.S President defunding of NPR and PBS blocked by judge, but damage is already done | Judge invalida; This Startup Catches Fraud at Scale; Inside The Startup Reinventing The $6 Trillion Chemical Manufacturing Industry | Dev Tools: Gabe Newell "stepped back" from making games at Valve after Portal 2 because everyone kept agreeing ; Chinese state media releases episode 2 of their AI generated Iran war animated series; Mark Zuckerberg, Larry Ellison, and Jensen Huang appointed to President's Council of Advisors on Sci; Demis Hassabis secretly built a hedge fund inside DeepMind trying to beat Jim Simons. Google shut it; Upgraded the budget homelab and decided to make a couple stickers for it | Culture: I asked Chat to make a photo of a college party in 2004 taken on a flip phone; Sora 2 megathread (part 3) | Wild Card: US patent office revokes Nintendo’s patent on summoning characters to make them battle | VGC; The era of human coding is over; I built a fully local, open-source thermal printer appliance - no cloud, no subscriptions, no accoun; Iran War Chokes Off Helium Supply Critical for AI; I'm a server
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Morning Edition - 2026-04-02

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Midday Edition - 2026-04-02
item.description: Midday Edition: AI Models: Updates for ChatGPT; Announcement: Temporary LLM Content Ban; The Bonsai 1-bit models are very good; GPT-4o/GPT-5 complaints megathread | Business: This Startup Catches Fraud at Scale; Inside The Startup Reinventing The $6 Trillion Chemical Manufacturing Industry | Dev Tools: Gabe Newell "stepped back" from making games at Valve after Portal 2 because everyone kept agreeing ; Chinese state media releases episode 2 of their AI generated Iran war animated series; Mark Zuckerberg, Larry Ellison, and Jensen Huang appointed to President's Council of Advisors on Sci; Upgraded the budget homelab and decided to make a couple stickers for it | Culture: Sora 2 megathread (part 3) | Wild Card: Group Pushing Age Verification Requirements for AI Turns Out to Be Sneakily Backed by OpenAI; I'm a server; The era of human coding is over; I built a fully local, open-source thermal printer appliance - no cloud, no subscriptions, no accoun; Nvidia market share in China falls to less than 60% — Chinese chip makers deliver 1.65 million AI GP
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Midday Edition - 2026-04-02

item.title: AI and Tech News Cast - Evening Edition - 2026-04-02
item.description: Evening Edition: AI Models: Updates for ChatGPT; Announcement: Temporary LLM Content Ban; [hackernews] Google releases Gemma 4 open models; [hackernews] Qwen3.6-Plus: Towards Real World Agents | Business: The US Burned 14 Years of Missiles in 30 Days; AI tractor startup collapses after burning $240M, laying off entire staff; YouTube CEO responds to concerns as big creators leave for Netflix & Amazon; Tesla's stock drops more than 4% on disappointing deliveries report | Dev Tools: your CI/CD pipeline probably ran malware on march 31st between 00:21 and 03:15 UTC. here's how to ch; Can finally be one of the cool kids.; <Generic vague question about obscure DevOps related pain point and asking how others are handlin; FAKKU DMCAed LANraragi, one of the most popular open-sourced self-hosted manga/doujinshi reader beca | Culture: LTX Desktop 1.0.3 is live! Now runs on 16 GB VRAM machines; If this is in Greece wouldn’t it cost multiple days of working to pay for a human to make this?; just let her look?..; Mommy Blue Checkmark is fighting with Daddy Blue Checkmark over what their Child Blue Checkmark made | Wild Card: Group Pushing Age Verification Requirements for AI Turns Out to Be Sneakily Backed by OpenAI; I'm a server; The era of human coding is over; 😭😭
item.itunes:title: AI and Tech News Cast - Evening Edition - 2026-04-02
